astrologers consider for drawing
the chart is a time that is exact even to seconds. This poses
the questions - Which is the correct Birth time? What are the
methods to derive the correct birth time?
Let us face these questions and find answers, as told by
the sages as well as supported by our logic.

Which is the correct Birth
Time?
There are several opinions among astrologers. The various
opinions are -
I) The time of first breath
2) The time of first cry
3) The time of touching the earth
4) The time of cutting umbilical cord
5) The time at which placenta breaks
6) The time at which some body part of the child become
visible outside the mothers body.
7) The time at which forehead appears.
The list is long, and there are many more opinions! If the
astrologers can't be sure what is birth time, how they are going
to predict the future of native based on the same?! Some
depend on logic, and some on ancient advice, and some are
